title: Charenthoth
content:
{{Top|ca|leg}} {{CelestialBody |image= |name=Charenthoth |region=*[[Colonies/Legends|Colonies]]''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' — Based on corresponding data for [[Charenthoth system/Legends|Charenthoth system]] *[[The Slice/Legends|The Slice]] |sector= |system=[[Charenthoth system/Legends|Charenthoth system]] |coordinates=N-9 |xyz= |distance= |suns= |orbited= |position= |moons= |routes= |lengthday= |lengthyear= |class= |diameter= |atmosphere= |climate= |gravity= |terrain= |water= |interest= |flora= |fauna= |otherlife= |species= |otherspecies= |socialgroup= |language= |government= |population= |demonym= |cities= |imports= |exports= |affiliation= }} {{Quote|In the grave of Alderaan,
In the night of Charenthoth,
In the sands of Tatooine,
And the bloody hell of Hoth.

We will meet the enemy;
We will sound the battle-cry.
With our comrades at our sides,
We will fight and we will die. ''[…]|Battle Chant of the Legion of Alderaan|[[The Rebel Alliance Sourcebook (Second Edition)|''The Rebel Alliance Sourcebook'', Second Edition]]}} '''Charenthoth''' was a celestial body located in the [[Charenthoth system/Legends|Charenthoth system]], a part of [[The Slice/Legends|the Slice]] portion of the [[Colonies/Legends|Colonies]]. During the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]] between the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] and the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]], the [[Battle Chant of the Legion of Alderaan|Battle Chant]] of the Alliance's [[Legion of Alderaan]] military unit mentioned the Rebels fighting the [[Imperial Military/Legends|Imperial forces]] "in the night of Charenthoth," among other locales. ==Behind the scenes== Charenthoth was first mentioned in [[Paul Murphy]]'s [[1990]] ''[[The Rebel Alliance Sourcebook]]'', which was published by [[West End Games]] for use with ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]''.''[[The Rebel Alliance Sourcebook]]'' The [[2009]] reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' placed the Charenthoth [[Star system/Legends|system]], and therefore the celestial body itself, in grid square N-9. ==Sources== {{Indexpage}} *''[[The Rebel Alliance Sourcebook]]'' {{1stm}} *[[The Rebel Alliance Sourcebook (Second Edition)|''The Rebel Alliance Sourcebook'', Second Edition]] ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} [[Category:Astronomical objects in the Colonies]] [[Category:Astronomical objects in the Slice]]
